## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Tests added or existing tests still pass (`pytest` subset or Compose smoke)
- [ ] No secrets (`.env`, keys, `manifest.secrets.json`) committed
